title: Andrew Lucia Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Andrew Lucia Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Andrew Lucia
Khoury Alumni
BS in Cybersecurity ’22
Mother is also a Khoury College Alumnus
For Andrew Lucia, the biggest draw of Khoury College was the co-op program. Securing a co-op with cybersecurity company K logix helped him find footing in his career early, bolstering his confidence and leading to his first job out of college as a penetration tester.
It was kind of crazy to actually see myself now compared to when I arrived — all the stuff I just feel comfortable doing. … Computer science can be a tricky field, but you got to stick with it, and if you do, you’re going to find success that way
Andrew Lucia, BSCY ’22
Explore all Khoury Stories
